description_long: This doll features a stylized, chibi-like design with an oversized head and small body, dressed entirely in black attire reminiscent of a ninja or stealth character. The face is partially obscured by long, jagged black hair that sweeps dramatically to one side, with only hints of facial features visible beneath. The eyes are large and vividly colored, displaying a striking mix of red, green, and blue hues that contrast sharply with the otherwise monochrome palette. The doll holds a sword in one hand, with the blade extending outward, and its stance suggests readiness or alertness. The overall form is compact and solid, with exaggerated proportions typical of collectible or decorative urban toys. The surface appears matte and smooth, with minimal textural detail except for the hair's sculpted strands.
description: A stylized, chibi-like doll dressed in black with long, jagged hair obscuring its face, holding a sword and featuring vividly colored eyes. The design is compact, with exaggerated proportions and a matte, smooth finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's large, colorful eyes, long black hair covering much of the face, and the sword held in the right hand.
description_view_1: Top-down view emphasizes the voluminous hair, mostly obscuring the face and body, with only the lower part of the face and sword tip visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head and body, dominated by the large, sculpted black hair, with minimal detail visible on the back.
description_view_3: Side view highlights the dramatic sweep of the hair, the sword extending outward, and a partial profile of the face and body.
attribute_clothing_style: All-black ninja-inspired outfit with a fitted top, pants, and gloves, lacking visible patterns or logos, evoking a stealth or anime character aesthetic.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with legs slightly apart, right arm bent forward holding a sword, left arm relaxed at the side, head slightly tilted downward and to the left.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with large, vividly colored eyes partially visible beneath the hair; mouth and eyebrows are mostly obscured, giving an enigmatic appearance.
attribute_hair_style: Long, jagged, and voluminous black hair sweeping dramatically to one side, covering much of the face and extending past the shoulders.
